item.title: Kubernetes Benchmark
item.author: Author
item.description: CIS(Center for Internet Security) Benchmark CIS-CAT Pro CIS-CAT Pro is supporting Kubernetes assessment. 1 ./Assessor-CLI.sh -i -nts -rd /var/www/html -rp index Kube-Bench of aqua Kube-Bench kube-bench is tool that checks whether Kubernetes is deployed securely by running the checks documented in the CIS Kubernetes Benchmark. Installation Installation You can check Installation document. 1 ./kube-bench --config-dir `pwd`/cfg --config `pwd`/cfg/config.
